targets.rawSql: SELECT dimension_value AS category, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend FROM spend_aggregates WHERE dimension = 'CATEGORY' AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY dimension_value ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT dimension_value AS merchant, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend FROM spend_aggregates WHERE dimension = 'MERCHANT' AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY dimension_value ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT window_start AS time, dimension_value AS metric, total_amount AS value FROM spend_aggregates WHERE dimension = 'CATEGORY' AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY window_start

panels.title: Top Accounts by Spend (last 5 min windows)

targets.rawSql: SELECT dimension_value AS account_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend, SUM(txn_count) AS transaction_count FROM spend_aggregates WHERE dimension = 'ACCOUNT' AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY dimension_value ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 20
